name: Giant Shark

traits.name: Spider Climb
traits.text: The spider can climb difficult surfaces, including along ceilings, without needing to make an ability check.

traits.name: Web Walker
traits.text: The spider ignores movement restrictions caused by webs, and it knows the location of any other creature in contact with the same web.

text:
# Giant Shark

*Large Beast, Unaligned*

### Actions

**Bite.** Melee Attack Roll: +5, reach 5 ft. Hit: 7 (1d8 + 3) Piercing damage plus 7 (2d6) Poison damage.

**Web (Recharge 5–6).** Dexterity Saving Throw: DC 13, one creature the spider can see within 60 feet. Failure: The target has the Restrained condition until the web is destroyed (AC 10; HP 5; Vulnerability to Fire damage; Immunity to Poison and Psychic damage).
